title: anguina ovata
intro: Anguina ovata, also known as False Rue-leavens, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Anguina ovata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
